message:
fix(reflect): reduce auto-outcome false positives and double-counting

Two bugs found during code review:

1. Rule ID regex matched common words (b-tree, b-spline, b-factor).
   Fix: require at least 6 chars AND at least one digit, since real
   bullet IDs from Date.now().toString(36) always contain digits.

2. Rules with explicit inline feedback (// [cass: helpful b-xyz])
   also received ambient session-level feedback from auto-outcome,
   double-counting the signal. Fix: exclude inline feedback rule IDs
   from the auto-outcome rulesUsed list.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
